---
format:
  pdf:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    documentclass: article
    papersize: a4
    margin:
      - 0pt
      - 0pt
      - 0pt
      - 0pt
    header-includes:
      - \usepackage[fontset=macnew]{ctex}
      - \usepackage[a4paper,margin=0pt]{geometry}
      - \usepackage{xcolor}
      - \usepackage{graphicx}
      - \usepackage{tikz}
      - \usepackage{pagecolor}
      - \usepackage{array}
      - \usepackage{booktabs}
      - \usepackage{colortbl}
      - \usetikzlibrary{shapes.geometric, positioning}
      - \definecolor{bgdark}{HTML}{1a1a2e}
      - \definecolor{cardbg}{HTML}{16213e}
      - \definecolor{accentgreen}{HTML}{2ecc71}
      - \definecolor{accentred}{HTML}{e74c3c}
      - \definecolor{accentyellow}{HTML}{f1c40f}
      - \definecolor{accentblue}{HTML}{3498db}
      - \definecolor{accentgray}{HTML}{95a5a6}
      - \definecolor{lighttext}{HTML}{ecf0f1}
      - \definecolor{subtletext}{HTML}{bdc3c7}
      - \definecolor{divider}{HTML}{2c3e50}
      - \pagecolor{bgdark}
      - \pagestyle{empty}
      - \setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
      - \setlength{\parskip}{0pt}
---

\begin{tikzpicture}[remember picture, overlay]

%% ===== ROW 1: Header — title + conclusion + big numbers + status light =====
\node[anchor=north west, inner sep=0pt] at (current page.north west) {
\begin{minipage}[t]{\paperwidth}
\begin{center}
\vspace{8mm}

%% Status light (green = pass)
\begin{tikzpicture}
\fill[accentgreen] (0,0) circle (4mm);
\fill[white] (0,0) circle (2.8mm);
\fill[accentgreen] (0,0) circle (2mm);
\end{tikzpicture}

\vspace{2mm}

{\color{lighttext}\fontsize{68}{82}\selectfont\bfseries delta0 量化数据报告}

\vspace{1mm}

{\color{subtletext}\fontsize{22}{28}\selectfont 2024-07-19 $\sim$ 2026-07-21 \quad|\quad VQM 三因子多空策略}

\vspace{3mm}

{\color{accentgreen}\fontsize{26}{34}\selectfont\bfseries $\bigtriangleup$ 增长 — 策略总收益 210.8\%，超额 186.7\%，回撤可控 -14.7\%}

\vspace{5mm}

%% Three big numbers
\begin{tabular}{ccc}
{\color{accentgreen}\fontsize{56}{68}\selectfont\bfseries +210.8\%} &
{\color{accentred}\fontsize{56}{68}\selectfont\bfseries -14.7\%} &
{\color{accentblue}\fontsize{56}{68}\selectfont\bfseries 3.24} \\[2mm]
{\color{subtletext}\fontsize{16}{20}\selectfont 总收益} &
{\color{subtletext}\fontsize{16}{20}\selectfont 最大回撤} &
{\color{subtletext}\fontsize{16}{20}\selectfont 夏普比率} \\
\end{tabular}

\vspace{6mm}

%% Divider line
{\color{divider}\rule{\paperwidth}{1.5pt}}

\end{center}
\end{minipage}
};

%% ===== ROW 2: Left (overview) | Center (NAV chart) | Right (KPI) =====

%% --- Left block: Research Overview ---
\node[anchor=north west, inner sep=4mm] at ([xshift=6mm,yshift=-72mm]current page.north west) {
\begin{minipage}[t]{52mm}
\begin{center}
{\color{accentblue}\fontsize{18}{22}\selectfont\bfseries 研究概述}
\end{center}
\vspace{3mm}

{\color{subtletext}\fontsize{10}{14}\selectfont
\begin{tabular}{@{}p{14mm}p{34mm}@{}}
\textcolor{accentgreen}{\textbf{名称}} & delta0 VQM 策略 \\
\textcolor{accentgreen}{\textbf{目标}} & 跑赢沪深300，回撤 $\leq$ 15\% \\
\textcolor{accentgreen}{\textbf{逻辑}} & 动量+质量+价值三因子 Z-score 打分，月度调仓，15\%回撤控制 \\
\textcolor{accentgreen}{\textbf{市场}} & A股·日线\\
\textcolor{accentgreen}{\textbf{周期}} & 2024-07-19 $\sim$ 2026-07-21 \\
\textcolor{accentgreen}{\textbf{样本}} & 分析10只；底座20只 \\
\textcolor{accentgreen}{\textbf{基准}} & 沪深300指数 \\
\end{tabular}
}

\vspace{3mm}
{\color{subtletext}\fontsize{8}{10}\selectfont CSV: \texttt{price\_qfq.csv}\\\texttt{monthly\_selection.csv}}
\end{minipage}
};

%% --- Center block: NAV vs Benchmark ---
\node[anchor=north, inner sep=0pt] at ([yshift=-74mm]current page.north) {
\begin{minipage}[t]{95mm}
\begin{center}
{\color{accentblue}\fontsize{16}{20}\selectfont\bfseries 业绩与风险主图}
\end{center}
\vspace{1mm}
\includegraphics[width=95mm]{poster/fig\_nav\_benchmark.png}

\vspace{1mm}
\includegraphics[width=95mm]{poster/fig\_drawdown\_strip.png}

\vspace{1mm}
{\color{subtletext}\fontsize{9}{12}\selectfont 超额收益主要出现在 \textcolor{accentgreen}{\textbf{2025 Q3 存储芯片主升浪}} 阶段}
\end{minipage}
};

%% --- Right block: KPI Dashboard ---
\node[anchor=north east, inner sep=4mm] at ([xshift=-6mm,yshift=-72mm]current page.north east) {
\begin{minipage}[t]{52mm}
\begin{center}
{\color{accentblue}\fontsize{18}{22}\selectfont\bfseries KPI 看板}
\end{center}
\vspace{2mm}

\setlength{\tabcolsep}{3pt}
\renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.6}
{\color{lighttext}\fontsize{9}{12}\selectfont
\begin{tabular}{@{}p{7mm}p{20mm}r@{}}
\toprule
\rowcolor{cardbg}
\multicolumn{3}{l}{\textcolor{accentgreen}{\textbf{收益}}} \\
\textcolor{accentgreen}{\textbf{收益}} & 总收益率 & \textcolor{accentgreen}{\textbf{+210.8\%}} \\
\textcolor{accentgreen}{\textbf{收益}} & 年化收益率 & \textcolor{accentgreen}{\textbf{+118.8\%}} \\
\rowcolor{cardbg}
\multicolumn{3}{l}{\textcolor{accentred}{\textbf{风险}}} \\
\textcolor{accentred}{\textbf{风险}} & 最大回撤 & \textcolor{accentred}{\textbf{-14.7\%}} \\
\textcolor{accentred}{\textbf{风险}} & 夏普比率 & \textcolor{accentblue}{\textbf{3.24}} \\
\textcolor{accentred}{\textbf{风险}} & 卡玛比率 & \textcolor{accentblue}{\textbf{8.07}} \\
\textcolor{accentred}{\textbf{风险}} & 年化波动 & \textcolor{accentred}{\textbf{36.0\%}} \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
}

\vspace{3mm}
{\color{subtletext}\fontsize{8}{10}\selectfont 基准(沪深300):\\总收益+24.2\% 夏普0.86 波动17.0\%}
\end{minipage}
};

%% ===== ROW 3: Left (heatmap) | Center (contribution) | Right (market env) =====

%% --- Left: Heatmap ---
\node[anchor=north west, inner sep=4mm] at ([xshift=6mm,yshift=-148mm]current page.north west) {
\begin{minipage}[t]{52mm}
\begin{center}
{\color{accentblue}\fontsize{14}{18}\selectfont\bfseries 月度收益热力图}
\end{center}
\vspace{1mm}
\includegraphics[width=52mm]{poster/fig\_heatmap.png}
\end{minipage}
};

%% --- Center: Contribution bar ---
\node[anchor=north, inner sep=0pt] at ([yshift=-148mm]current page.north) {
\begin{minipage}[t]{90mm}
\begin{center}
{\color{accentblue}\fontsize{14}{18}\selectfont\bfseries 个股贡献度}
\end{center}
\vspace{1mm}
\includegraphics[width=85mm]{poster/fig\_contrib.png}
\end{minipage}
};

%% --- Right: Market Environment Table ---
\node[anchor=north east, inner sep=4mm] at ([xshift=-6mm,yshift=-148mm]current page.north east) {
\begin{minipage}[t]{52mm}
\begin{center}
{\color{accentblue}\fontsize{14}{18}\selectfont\bfseries 市场环境}
\end{center}
\vspace{1mm}

\setlength{\tabcolsep}{2pt}
\renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.3}
{\color{lighttext}\fontsize{7.5}{10}\selectfont
\begin{tabular}{@{}c c r r@{}}
\toprule
\textbf{季度} & \textbf{状态} & \textbf{策略} & \textbf{沪深300} \\
\midrule
25Q1 & 震荡 & \textcolor{accentgreen}{+13.7\%} & +1.8\% \\
25Q2 & 震荡 & \textcolor{accentgreen}{+2.7\%} & +1.2\% \\
25Q3 & 上涨 & \textcolor{accentgreen}{+69.8\%} & +17.7\% \\
25Q4 & 震荡 & \textcolor{accentgreen}{+14.9\%} & \textcolor{accentred}{-1.7\%} \\
26Q1 & 下跌 & \textcolor{accentgreen}{-0.5\%} & \textcolor{accentred}{-5.7\%} \\
26Q2 & 上涨 & \textcolor{accentgreen}{+47.3\%} & +10.0\% \\
26Q3 & 震荡 & \textcolor{accentred}{-5.7\%} & \textcolor{accentred}{-4.4\%} \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
}
\end{minipage}
};

%% ===== ROW 4: Conclusions & Action (bottom ~12%) =====

\node[anchor=south west, inner sep=0pt] at (current page.south west) {
\begin{minipage}[t]{\paperwidth}
{\color{divider}\rule{\paperwidth}{1pt}}

\vspace{3mm}
\hspace{8mm}
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.30\paperwidth}
{\color{accentgreen}\fontsize{12}{16}\selectfont\bfseries $\checkmark$ 优势}
\vspace{1mm}

{\color{lighttext}\fontsize{9}{12}\selectfont
1. 三因子Z-score打分有效捕捉存储芯片主升浪\\
2. 15\%回撤控制将-48\%回撤截断至-14.7\%
}
\end{minipage}
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.28\paperwidth}
{\color{accentred}\fontsize{12}{16}\selectfont\bfseries $\times$ 不足}
\vspace{1mm}

{\color{lighttext}\fontsize{9}{12}\selectfont
1. 收益高度集中于半导体板块（Top3占124\%）\\
2. 32\%空仓时间错过部分反弹机会
}
\end{minipage}
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.30\paperwidth}
{\color{accentyellow}\fontsize{12}{16}\selectfont\bfseries $\rightarrow$ 下一步}
\vspace{1mm}

{\color{lighttext}\fontsize{9}{12}\selectfont
\textcolor{accentgreen}{\textbf{[立即]}} 加入风格约束限制进攻型持仓\\
\textcolor{accentyellow}{\textbf{[本周]}} 测试延迟切换ETF方案\\
\textcolor{accentblue}{\textbf{[持续]}} 滚动更新PE/ROE因子
}
\end{minipage}
\hspace{8mm}

\vspace{3mm}
%% Bottom disclaimer + logo
\hspace{8mm}
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.65\paperwidth}
{\color{subtletext}\fontsize{6}{8}\selectfont
本量化数据报告不构成投资建议，仅个人间讨论，切勿模仿！本报告已获得版权保护，属于创作者和程翊博所有，切勿盗用商用，违者必究，需负相应的法律责任。}
\end{minipage}
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.20\paperwidth}
\raggedleft
\includegraphics[width=22mm]{logo.png}\\
{\color{subtletext}\fontsize{6}{8}\selectfont 数据来源：AKShare / Tushare}
\end{minipage}
\hspace{8mm}

\vspace{4mm}
\end{minipage}
};

\end{tikzpicture}
